creator: jason@zx2c4.com
text: Indeed those patches I posted here are (already) out of date. But upstream master now has patches that appear to workaround the kernel bugs of this report. I think we're done here on the WireGuard front and it should be time to ship the fixes in the official package. However, do pipe up if you're able to crash things again in relation to WireGuard with yet-even-more FreeBSD kernel race conditions, and I'll take out the hatchet and try to hack around it.
